attacks.name: Bind
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Powerful Friends
attacks.text: If you have any Stage 2 Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 50 more damage.

abilities.name: Time Recall
abilities.text: Each of your evolved Pokémon can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: Slicing Snipe
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Terminating Tail
attacks.text: Discard GrassGrass Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Firefighting
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spore
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Pre-Dawn Strike
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Prickly Powder
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon loses all Abilities. This effect lasts until the Defending Pokémon leaves the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Protect
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bite Together
attacks.text: If Durant is on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Share
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sour Spit
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 1 Colorless more.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Eruption
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a Fire Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each Fire Energy you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Volcanic Kaboom
attacks.text: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random. Do 160 damage to it.

attacks.name: Sunny Scorching
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

abilities.name: Victory Star
abilities.text: Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack of 1 of your [R] Pokémon, you may ignore all results of those coin flips and begin flipping those coins again. You can't use more than 1 Victory Star Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, take 2 Fire Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flare Storm
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Double Smash 40x
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Fire Arrow
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hit Twice 30x
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Raid
attacks.text: If this Pokémon evolved from Poliwhirl during this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

abilities.name: Frozen Flow
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Muddy Headbutt
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Fighting Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Rainy Absorbing
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Snowy Chilling
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.text: Move 2 random Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.text: Put a random Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

abilities.name: Swift Shot
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Swift Shot
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may do 30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Double Type
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [W] and [F] type.

attacks.name: Tornado Shot
attacks.text: Discard a Water Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack also does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Storm Blade
attacks.text: Discard a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Single Shot Blast
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Electroblast
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Vengeful Shock
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Full Belly Bolt
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has no damage on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Double Spin 30x
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

abilities.name: Perplexing Ears
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Confused.

attacks.name: Diamond Storm
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from each of your Psychic Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pester the Dizzy
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Mental Crush
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 70 more damage.

abilities.name: Accept Pain
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may move 30 damage that your Active Pokémon has on it to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Mad Hammer
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Teary Attack
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −30 damage.

attacks.name: Fighting Fist
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Close Combat
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes +20 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Fighting Pulse
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Fighting Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Earthen Sword
attacks.text: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Circle Throw
attacks.text: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Brick Break
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.text: During your next turn, attacks used by your Fighting Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triple Smash 50x
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Mountain Crush
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Super Sand Attack
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

attacks.name: Training
attacks.text: Take a Colorless Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Surprise Strike
attacks.text: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Gas Bomb
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Spiny Rush 40x
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.text: Put a random card from your deck that evolves from this Pokémon onto this Pokémon to evolve it.

attacks.name: Brutal Bash 30x
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched Darkness Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dangerous Spores
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Blindside
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that have damage on them.

attacks.name: Evolution Jammer
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Pokémon.

abilities.name: Double Type

attacks.text: Discard a Darkness Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.
